# daytona_sandbox_public_status (Data Source)

Checks whether a Daytona sandbox is public through the preview API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_public_status" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the sandbox is public.
